char_overview: Intelligence gatherer and spy with sharp wit.
char_looks: 180cm Long purple hair, loosely tied at nape Purple eyes. White loose shirt, black suit jacket, black casual pants, sneakers. None, uses 灵力回路 for combat.
char_traits: Gossip lover; Sharp-witted; Secretive; Highly adaptable.
char_flaws: Acts independently, dislikes sharing intelligence.; Meticulous about nails; Traces thread patterns on tabletops when thinking.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-牵丝: Projects 灵力 as thin resilient threads for tracking, monitoring, binding, and cutting.
char_mission: Intelligence gathering for 狩灵协会4科.
char_origin: Awakened 牵丝 at an early age, used it to coast through university. Passed the 狩灵协会 assessment and joined 狩灵协会4科, where her ability found a legitimate purpose.
